news.content: Awarded a KAKENHI Grant-in-Aid for Early-Career Scientists, Japan
Joined ISEE & TRANSEHA, Nagoya University as a Postdoctoral Researcher
Graduated with Ph.D. Forest science, Chungbuk National University
Awarded for the COMPA Grant Program for 'Universities Leading Lab-Specific Start-Ups' funded by MSIT and KISED, Korea

Received the Best Presentation Award at the Korean Society of Wood Science & Technology (KSWST)
(Title: New device for connecting between an increment borer and hand drill to support the extraction of increment cores)
Awarded for 'Fostering Laboratory-Specialized Startup Leading Universities' funded by MSIT, Korea

Received the Best Presentation Award at the KSWST
(Title: Investigating the Mortality of Abies koreana at Yeongshinbong in Jirisan National Park)

Received the Best Presentation Award at the KSWST
(Title: Monitoring the Seasonal Cambial Activities of Abies koreana, Pinus koraiensis, and Picea jezoensis)

Received the Best Presentation Award at the KSWST
(Title: Ring-Width Chronology vs. δ18O Tree-Ring Chronology)
